title: VaultSMP
description: A Modpack for the VaultSMP server.
body:
![Vault SMP Season 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cd7fe12b6b54194473696af91b9cadd026e3a33_0.webp)

# About the Modpack
This Modpack is for all Seasons of the VaultSMP by The VaultSMP Group.
VaultSMP is a invite only minecraft SMP with a focus on the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) Mod by [simibubi](https://modrinth.com/user/simibubi) ([Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) used in the Fabric versions by [tropheusj](https://modrinth.com/user/tropheusj)) and player interaction.

## Versions
The Version numbers tell you what Season the modpach is currently on.
The first number tells you the season, the second the main version, the third the under version and the fourth marks small changens.
So version [1.2.4](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vaultsmp/version/1.2.4) would be the first season version 2.4.

### Warning
When updating we adwise you to look at the version number and find out the season because in every season we change most of the mods and sometimes even the platforms.

## Season 2
### Description
This Season we not only wanted to focus on the (https://modrinth.com/mod/create) Mod, but also on the mods from [Content SMP](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLejL0oSihczXRoCVX_Iawu3HE1CVf9j5K) by [RAT](https://modrinth.com/user/RAT) ([doctor4t](https://www.youtube.com/@doctor4t) on YouTube), [Luxintrus](https://modrinth.com/user/Luxintrus) ([YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@Luxintrus)), [Winsweep](https://modrinth.com/user/Winsweep) ([YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@WinSweep)) and many more.
